objective: Cycle 7 Feature — PS1/N64 retro post-processing system
checkpoint: PSX retro rendering mode added to CRTLayer. New shader (retro_psx_post.gdshader) with pixelation, 15-bit color banding, Bayer dithering, warm tint, biome fog profiles. 8 biome color presets, day/night auto-tinting via DayNightManager. 3D scene save/restore render mode. 4 files modified, 349 lines changed.
